summary: Maintenance run on the harness repo itself; scope = FORGE-INIT-1 (forge init: per-file collision check for non-empty targets). Plan reviewed, edited, and approved by the maintainer; decision 0010 (accepted by vrknetha) establishes maintainer plan approval as client sign-off for harness maintenance runs. Plan carries falsifiable verification (pytest gate tests + end-to-end rerun of the original failing scenario). No further questions: remaining candidates would only confirm what the approved plan and decision 0010 already state.
gaps: docs/product/DISCOVERY.md does not exist in the harness repo (the repo predates its own phase-0 ceremony); the signoff grill scope names it
resolutions: Decision 0010-client-signoff (accepted, committed with Confirmed-by trailer) scopes harness maintenance runs: maintainer plan approval stands in for client sign-off; the missing DISCOVERY.md is parked as a non-blocking open item
open_items: non-blocking: harness repo has no docs/product/DISCOVERY.md — its discovery record is README.md/WORKFLOW.md/docs/harness-philosophy.md; acceptable for maintenance runs, revisit only if the harness ever runs a full product phase-0 on itself
